title: Ishaan Madaan joins Mandelbaum Barrett as Counsel to launch International Arbitration Practice and India Desk
description: Ishaan Madaan has joined Mandelbaum Barrett PC as Counsel in its New York office to launch its International Arbitration practice. In addition, Madaan will launch and lead the firm’s new India Desk, a strategic initiative aimed at serving Indian businesses, founders, investors, and institutions operating in or entering the U.S. market.Madaan brings experience across the full arc of the India-U.S. legal corridor to Mandelbaum Barrett PC, including eight years of practice and co-founding a boutiqu
